'''Shron''' was a small, [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the innermost planet of the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-12-04 -->{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031204hoth1|series=Hoth: Under the Ice|text=Part 1: Snowflake Base}} {{1stm}}
